title: MBBS in Russia
description: Secure admission to top Russian medical universities with NMC-recognized MBBS programs. Affordable tuition with high-quality education and global recognition.

title: Engineering Programs
description: World-class engineering degrees in Computer Science, Mechanical, Civil, and Electrical Engineering at Russia's top technical universities.

title: Aviation Courses
description: Pursue your dream of flying with internationally accredited aviation programs including Commercial Pilot License (CPL) and Air Traffic Management.

title: Business & Management
description: MBA and Business Management programs taught by experienced faculty at Russia's leading business schools with strong industry connections.

title: Visa Assistance
description: Complete visa processing support including documentation preparation, application submission, and tracking for student visa to Russia.

title: Hostel & Accommodation
description: Safe and comfortable hostel arrangements near your university campus with affordable monthly rates and essential amenities included.

title: Airport Pickup
description: Reliable airport pickup service for new students arriving in Russia. Our representatives will meet you and guide you safely to your accommodation.

title: Student Support in Russia
description: Continuous on-ground support throughout your studies — from orientation and language assistance to medical help and cultural integration.
